channel.title: Office365 on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Office365 on Arrans github.io

item.title: massgravel/Microsoft-Activation-Scripts
item.description: Open-source Windows and Office activator featuring HWID, Ohook, TSforge, KMS38, and Online KMS activation methods, along with advanced troubleshooting.

item.title: microsoftgraph/microsoft-graph-explorer
item.description: We’ve moved! You can contribute to our new repository here
